title: Anettea × duveenii

taxonomy: Anettea × duveenii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is a hybrid of the species Anettea grandifolia and is native to Ecuador. The classification of Anettea × duveenii is further categorized under the family Gesneriaceae and the order Lamiales.
